nasb.text: Then he brought me into the outer court, and behold, there were chambers and a pavement made for the court all around; thirty chambers faced the pavement.

esv.text: Then he brought me into the outer court. And behold, there were chambers and a pavement, all around the court. Thirty chambers faced the pavement.

cnv.text: 他帶我到了外院，我見有些房子，院子周圍有鋪石地，鋪石地上有三十間房子。

ccb.text: 他带我到外院，外院靠墙的四周是铺石地，上面共有三十间厢房。
